title: Upon Croot.
content:
One silver spoon shines in the house of Croot;
    Who cannot buy or steal a second to't.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Croot.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
